steps.title: Match the angles
steps.content: The triangles are similar, so corresponding angles have equal measures. Since $J$ corresponds to $M$ and the right angles $L$ and $P$ correspond, the remaining angles $K$ and $N$ correspond.

steps.title: Use equal cosine values
steps.content:
Because $K$ and $N$ are corresponding angles, their cosine values are equal.
$$\cos N=\cos K=\frac{1}{18}$$
The answer is A.
